economic_notes: First Nation located on Manitoulin Island, Ontario. Has 14.28% equity interest in UCCMLP (building materials) and 16.66% equity interest in MMPLP (power). COVID-19 pandemic noted as risk factor. Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership distributions noted as reserve fund.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (year ended March 31, 2021). Two Government Business Partnerships accounted for under modified equity method: UCCMLP (building materials) and MMPLP (power). Federal funding per Note 12 includes ISC of $2,367,153 and CMHC of $33,056. OSR calculated as total revenue ($4,313,509) minus total government transfers ($2,400,209) = $1,913,300. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Contingent liability of $173,190 related to Robinson Huron Treaty Trust loan guarantee. Community Property segment revenue of $1,610,355 largely reflects capital investment activity. No separate social assistance expense line; Band and Social Housing combined as $154,058.
